# Pull Request Template

## Description
<!--- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Related Issue
<!--- Link to the issue here: Fixes #123 -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] CI/CD / Dev tooling

## Checklist
- [ ] My code builds without errors (pnpm build)
- [ ] Type checking passes (pnpm typecheck)
- [ ] Linting passes (pnpm lint)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective
- [ ] UI changes: checked on mobile (375px) and desktop (1440px)
- [ ] UI changes: light/dark mode both verified
- [ ] No .ts files containing JSX
- [ ] No dead code or commented-out blocks
- [ ] pnpm-lock.yaml updated if package.json changed
- [ ] Alembic migration generated (if backend DB schema changed)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Additional Context
